---
title: 'Kavita Dedicated Apps'
---

## Kavita Dedicated 3rd Party Apps
This is a collection of different apps created specifically for Kavita.

### Inkita
Inkita is a dedicated Android client for Kavita.
Download [here](https://github.com/dom-53/Inkita)

### Kover

A dedicated cross-platform Kavita client featuring offline reading with seamless progress synchronization.
Works on mobile, desktop, and web.
Download [here](https://github.com/rodonisi/kover)

## Kavita Dedicated 3rd Party App plugins
This is a collection of plugins for 3rd party apps that integrate with Kavita.

### Discord Bot
A Discord bot that integrates with your Kavita server, allowing you to browse and read content directly within Discord.
Download [here](https://github.com/0xGingi/kavita-discord-reader)

### Kamare
kamare is a manga reader plugin for KOReader that connects to Kavita.

This [KOReader](/koreader) plugin provides a seamless way to read manga from Kavita without going through OPDS, featuring a custom renderer that also supports long-strip formats commonly used in manhwa.
Download [here](https://github.com/fpammer/kamare.koplugin)
